What does the P vs NP problem ask?
choices: Whether every problem whose solution can be verified in polynomial time can also be solved in polynomial time
Whether polynomial-time algorithms can always be parallelized
Whether NP-complete problems require exponential space
Whether all P problems are also NP-complete

questions.q: What is the time complexity of Dijkstra's algorithm using a binary heap for a graph with V vertices and E edges?

A farmer has 17 sheep. All but 9 die. How many sheep are left?
Is it legal for a man to marry his widow's sister?
Which is correct: 'The yolk of an egg IS white' or 'The yolk of an egg ARE white'?
choices: Neither — egg yolks are yellow, not white

questions.q: How many animals of each kind did Moses take onto the ark?
choices: Moses took none — it was Noah's ark

questions.q: Two US coins total 55 cents. One of them is not a nickel. What are the two coins?
